**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Michael Technology Co., Ltd. is an extremely classic 'universal proxy shell company with multi-million nominal capital and actual zero employees.' The forensic engine has forcefully cleansed the underlying massive fake consumer electronics OEM data triggered by Apple Inc. The official commercial system, merely because its name contains the word 'Technology' and 'electronic equipment' appeared in its license, shockingly and absurdly not only categorized it into the heavy-asset 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' but also slapped on the ridiculous tag of 'Medium-sized Enterprise' (likely due to the 10 million registered capital). However, the physical probe and common-sense engine immediately launched a comprehensive demotion strike: this is a super-old shell established in 2004, its paid-in capital is 2.5 million, but its insured headcount is an extremely dismal '0 people'! The most fatal evidence lies in its geographical coordinates: 'Room 11E, Building 1, No. 333 Taiping South Road, Qinhuai District, Nanjing City.' Taiping South Road is a famous jewelry, department store, and commercial street in downtown Nanjing. Inside a single 11th-floor office of a downtown commercial building, relying on 0 employees to 'manufacture' electronic devices and sustain a 'medium-sized manufacturing enterprise'? This is a complete trampling of the laws of physics. Re-examining its business license, which reads like a supermarket inventory list: selling everything from 'scientific research product R&D' all the way to 'toys, clothing, cosmetics, furniture, office supplies.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not a medium-sized electronic manufacturing plant; it is a pure Zero-Employee Universal Trading Shell located in the city center. The boss (Ge Hong) retains this seemingly powerful multi-million-level old shell purely to act as a 'middleman,' capable of selling anything and issuing any invoice.
